description: Several findings (VVP-002, VVP-004, plus 005a/c/d/e/f, VVP-008 session lifetime, VVP-009 logout POST, VVP-014 nginx h2c) are sitting at fix-in-progress waiting for the next /audit run. title: Run sec-toolkit /audit to close fix-in-progress findings
